untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation of reversal arbitrage fixed cost using inputs not available in the allowed indicator set: Dividend to be paid, Interest rate per month, Months held, and Striking price. These are fundamental options/dividend inputs, not price-based technical indicators. The formula cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and the provided technical indicators (SMA, EMA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns). Additionally, the rule requires comparison of calculated fixed cost against a threshold (negative vs positive), which necessitates real-time dividend and interest rate data feeds not present in a standard backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_189 is a fundamental arbitrage pricing model requiring external data inputs (dividends, interest rates, strike prices) and quantitative modeling beyond technical analysis. This belongs in a specialized derivatives pricing engine rather than a price-action backtest system.
